name: vibe-flow
description: An orchestration-first, advisory, auto-capable development workflow for Claude Code: it sequences best-of-breed tools across five phases (understand, decide, plan, implement, review) and never blocks edits.

plugins.name: vibe-flow
plugins.description: Orchestration-first, advisory workflow that conducts other skills by instruction with graceful degradation, scales fan-out by effort (lite/full/ultra), and runs all five phases unattended in auto mode.
